speeches.name: Jerome Powell
speeches.role: Chair, Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
speeches.summary: Powell said policy was appropriately positioned, emphasized uncertainty, and stressed that future moves would be data-dependent and taken meeting by meeting.

speeches.name: Jerome Powell
speeches.role: Chair, Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
speeches.summary: Powell described the balance of risks as having shifted and supported a 25 bp cut, framing the move as a step toward a more neutral stance.

speeches.name: Jerome Powell
speeches.role: Chair, Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
speeches.summary: Powell said the current stance was appropriate, acknowledged Middle East uncertainty, and reiterated commitment to bringing inflation back to 2%.

speeches.name: Jerome Powell
speeches.role: Chair, Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
speeches.summary: Powell said the risks had become more balanced and that the Fed was moving in the direction of neutral with a 25 bp cut.

speeches.name: Jerome Powell
speeches.role: Chair, Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
speeches.summary: Powell highlighted that labor market stability and stubborn inflation left policy near the high end of neutral, implying a cautious stance.

macro_fred.narrative: Leaning Neutral: CPI at 4.0%, Fed Funds at 3.62%, unemployment at 4.3%.
